name: MTAR Technologies Limited
summary: MTAR Technologies Limited, a precision engineering solutions company, develops, manufactures, and sells high precision components and equipment in India and internationally. The company offers fuel machining heads, transfer magazine bridges, coolant channel and columns, standpipe thimble assembly, liner tube, ball screws, sealing plugs, shielding plugs, fuel locator assembly adjustor rod mechanisms, shut off rod drive mechanisms calendria, PFBR assemblies, grid plate, control plug, grid plates, control plug, end fittings, drive mechanisms, top hatch cover beams and deck plate assemblies, CHAS products, and ball screws and water lubricated bearings for use in nuclear sector. It also provides base shroud assemblies and air frames, actuator assembly components, LCA components, missile parts, valves, electro-pneumatic modules electro-pneumatic modules, liquid propulsion engines, cryogenic engines, ball screws, and water lubricated bearings for use in space and defense sectors; and power units for clean energy sector. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
